rows: SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = 42 FOR UPDATE;
UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - 100 WHERE id = 42;
UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - 100 WHERE id = 42;
narrative_hint: [DEMO CONTEXT] Lock wait analysis confirms PID 10245 is the head blocker. It holds an exclusive lock on the `accounts` table/row while running an uncommitted update, blocking both the row lock update and the reporting summary query. Checking index usage next to verify if table scans are amplifying locks.
